{"node-1773531154833":{"DropNullFields":{"Inputs":["node-1773531134653"],"Name":"Drop Null Fields","NullCheckBoxList":{"IsEmpty":false,"IsNegOne":false},"NullTextList":[]}},"node-1773531134653":{"DropDuplicates":{"Columns":[],"Inputs":["node-1773531107394"],"Name":"Drop Duplicates"}},"node-1773531107394":{"S3ParquetSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":"s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/bronze/Calendar/run-1773529393213-part-block-0-r-00000-snappy.parquet"},"Exclusions":[],"Name":"Calendar Source","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"date","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/bronze/Calendar/"],"Recurse":true}},"node-1773531175921":{"ApplyMapping":{"Inputs":["node-1773531154833"],"Mapping":[{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["date"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"date","ToType":"string"}],"Name":"Change Schema"}},"node-1773532215440":{"SelectFromCollection":{"Index":0,"Inputs":["node-1773531670095"],"Name":"Select From Collection"}},"node-1773532196517":{"S3GlueParquetTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"EvaluationContext":"EvaluateDataQuality_node1773530968644","IsEnabled":true},"Compression":"snappy","Inputs":["node-1773532215440"],"Name":"Amazon S3","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/silver/calendar/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}},"node-1773531670095":{"CustomCode":{"ClassName":"MyTransform","Code":"from awsglue.dynamicframe import DynamicFrame, DynamicFrameCollection
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_date, date_format, date_trunc, trunc, month, year, dayofweek, when

# Get input dynamic frame
dyf = dfc.select(list(dfc.keys())[0])

# Convert to DataFrame
df = dyf.toDF()

# Ensure calendar column is date
df = df.withColumn("Date", to_date(col("Date")))

df = df \
    .withColumn("Day Name", date_format(col("Date"), "EEEE")) \
    .withColumn("Start of Week", date_trunc("week", col("Date")).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("Start of Month", trunc(col("Date"), "month")) \
    .withColumn("Start of Quarter", date_trunc("quarter", col("Date")).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("Month Name", date_format(col("Date"), "MMMM")) \
    .withColumn("Month", month(col("Date"))) \
    .withColumn("Start of Year", trunc(col("Date"), "year")) \
    .withColumn("Year", year(col("Date"))) \
    .withColumn("Month Short", date_format(col("Date"), "MMM")) \
    .withColumn("Day of Week", dayofweek(col("Date"))) \
    .withColumn("Weekend", when(dayofweek(col("Date")).isin(1,7), "Yes").otherwise("No"))

# Convert back to DynamicFrame
new_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(df, glueContext, "new_dyf")

return DynamicFrameCollection({"output": new_dyf}, glueContext)","Inputs":["node-1773531175921"],"Name":"Custom Transform","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"Date","Type":"date"},{"Name":"Day Name","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Start of Week","Type":"date"},{"Name":"Start of Month","Type":"date"},{"Name":"Start of Quarter","Type":"date"},{"Name":"Month Name","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Month","Type":"int"},{"Name":"Start of Year","Type":"date"},{"Name":"Year","Type":"int"},{"Name":"Month Short","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Day of Week","Type":"int"},{"Name":"Weekend","Type":"string"}]}]}}}
